summary: Ukrainian drone operators from the 1st "Azov" Corps are actively targeting Russian logistics near Donetsk, exploiting gaps in Russian air defenses along key routes including Zuhres, Andriivka, Starobesheve, Horlivka, Lysychansk, and the Donetsk Ring Road. On the night of April 16, the SBS Night Birds conducted a coordinated strike hitting 16 military targets, including three air defense systems, two Iskander bases, a Rubicon base, two oil depots, and logistics facilities, with the 9th "Kairos" squadron also striking Iskander OTRK bases in Crimea. Meanwhile, the Russian "Rubicon" Center reported destroying 105 Ukrainian targets on April 16 and 107 on April 15, focusing on personnel, fixed-wing UAVs, and coordinating with Russian Aerospace Forces to neutralize Ukrainian UAV launch positions. On the ground, FPV drones were used to kill Russian soldiers, including one who attempted to feign surrender before fleeing, and to target assault teams using motorcycles, while Ukrainian forces employed electronic warfare to force enemy drones to land and survived an FPV attack near Kostiantinivka, aided by drone detectors.
